metadata.title: Why deterministic translation fixtures matter
metadata.excerpt: A practical note on reproducible translation tests.

source_analysis.author_voice_summary: Dry, practical, structurally aware engineering prose.

consistency_rules: Use the same borrowing decision in title, excerpt, and body.
rationale_notes: Borrow infrastructure terms that serious PT-BR engineering prose already leaves in English.

translated.title: Por que fixtures deterministicas de traducao importam
translated.excerpt: Uma nota pratica sobre testes de traducao reproduziveis.
translated.content:
## Contexto

Times entregam mais rapido quando os testes de traducao sao deterministicos.

### O que validar

1. Campos do frontmatter continuam coerentes.
2. Estrutura de markdown e preservada.
3. Saidas de etapas podem ser validadas sem chamadas de rede.

critique.feedback: Terminology and markdown structure are preserved.

findings.description: Maintain the approved borrowing decision consistently.
findings.fix_hint: Keep borrowed testing terms aligned with the terminology packet.
